Welcome to Rudra Office

A professional document editor powered by Rudra Code — full DOCX, ODT, PDF, and Markdown support with real-time formatting.

table Insert Table

add_comment Add Comment

link Insert Hyperlink

image Image Alt Text

closed_caption Image Caption

vertical_split Headers & Footers

draw Insert Shape

Shape Properties

keyboard Keyboard Shortcuts

Editing

UndoCtrl+Z
RedoCtrl+Y
CutCtrl+X
CopyCtrl+C
PasteCtrl+V
Select AllCtrl+A
Paste without FormattingCtrl+Shift+V
Find & ReplaceCtrl+F
Line BreakShift+Enter
Delete Word LeftCtrl+Backspace
Delete Word RightCtrl+Delete
Insert CommentCtrl+Alt+M
Insert EquationCtrl+Shift+E
Insert BookmarkCtrl+Shift+B
Insert FootnoteCtrl+Alt+F
Insert EndnoteCtrl+Alt+D
Document OutlineCtrl+Shift+O

Formatting

BoldCtrl+B
ItalicCtrl+I
UnderlineCtrl+U
StrikethroughAlt+Shift+5
SuperscriptCtrl+.
SubscriptCtrl+,
Increase Font SizeCtrl+Shift+>
Decrease Font SizeCtrl+Shift+<
Clear FormattingCtrl+\

Paragraphs

Align LeftCtrl+L
Align CenterCtrl+E
Align RightCtrl+R
JustifyCtrl+J
IndentTab
OutdentShift+Tab
Numbered ListCtrl+Shift+7
Bulleted ListCtrl+Shift+8
Normal StyleCtrl+Alt+0
Heading 1-6Ctrl+Alt+1..6

File

New DocumentCtrl+N
OpenCtrl+O
SaveCtrl+S
PrintCtrl+P
Zoom InCtrl++
Zoom OutCtrl+-
Reset ZoomCtrl+0

Slash Commands

Type / at start of paragraph for quick insert
/heading1..4, /bullet, /numbered, /table, /hr, /pagebreak, /quote, /code

group Share & Collaborate

No peers connected

description New from Template

description Page Setup

Page Size
Orientation
Margins (inches)

view_column Columns

Custom

description Welcome to Rudra Office

A collaborative document editor powered by Rudra Code.

format_bold
Rich Formatting -- Bold, italic, fonts, colors, and more
group
Real-time Collaboration -- Edit with others in real-time
track_changes
Track Changes -- Review and accept/reject edits
download
Export Options -- Save as DOCX, PDF, ODT, or TXT
keyboard
Keyboard Shortcuts -- Press Ctrl+/ for all shortcuts

new_releases What's New

New Real-time Collaboration

Edit documents simultaneously with others using WebSocket-based collaboration.

New Track Changes

Review insertions and deletions with accept/reject controls.

New Table of Contents

Auto-generated TOC from document headings via Insert menu.

New Dark Mode

Toggle dark mode from Tools menu or system preference.

New Feature Tour

Guided tour of the editor UI -- access from Help menu anytime.

functions Insert Equation

bookmark Insert Bookmark

book Custom Dictionary

auto_fix_high Auto-Correct

→

draw Create Signature

view_module Page Management

verified_user Sign Document

verified_user Sign Document

error Error Details

No errors recorded.

bar_chart Usage Statistics

All data is stored locally. Nothing is sent over the network.

special_character Special Characters
